title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. minima
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. minima, also known as small eyebright, is a subspecies of the eyebright plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating eye and ear infections, as well as respiratory issues such as bronchitis and sinusitis. The health benefits of small eyebright include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms associated with allergies, colds, and flu, while also promoting healthy digestion and reducing fever. Small eyebright can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to soothe and calm the body.
